chunks.title: Hezekiah's Illness and Healing
chunks.reason: Narrative of Hezekiah's sickness, prayer, and miraculous recovery.

chunks.title: The Sign of the Shadow
chunks.reason: Dialogue between Hezekiah and Isaiah regarding the sign of healing.

chunks.title: Visit from Babylonian Envoys
chunks.reason: Narrative of envoys arriving and Hezekiah showing his treasures.

chunks.title: Prophecy Against Babylon
chunks.reason: Isaiah's oracle predicting the future exile of Hezekiah's treasures and sons.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Death and Succession
chunks.reason: Concluding narrative about Hezekiah's deeds and the succession of Manasseh.
